assignments.description: Builds a delete-ready ContactPointPhone from the current Loop_Split_Phones (PrepopulatedItems) item. Stamps Id onto var_SinglePhone, adds to var_DeletePhones. Routes back to Loop_Split_Phones.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Delete_Phone
assignments.label: Add Phone to Delete List

assignments.description: Builds a new ContactPointPhone record from the current Loop_Split_Phones_New (AddedItems) iteration. Stamps screen field values and ParentId onto var_SinglePhone, then adds var_SinglePhone to var_NewPhones. Routes back to Loop_Split_Phones_New.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_New_Phone
assignments.label: Build New Phone Record

assignments.description: Builds an update-ready ContactPointPhone record from the current Loop_Split_Phones (PrepopulatedItems) iteration. Copies screen field values onto var_SinglePhone (preserving Id), then adds var_SinglePhone to var_UpdatePhones. Routes back to Loop_Split_Phones.
assignments.name: Assign_Build_Update_Phone
assignments.label: Build Update Phone Record

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when Loop_Count_Primary_Phones.field_Phone_IsPrimary is true. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Phones.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Phone
assignments.label: Increment Primary Phone Count

assignments.description: Increments var_PrimaryCount by 1 when a newly added phone row has the Primary checkbox checked. Routes back to Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added.
assignments.name: Assign_Count_Primary_Phone_Added
assignments.label: Increment Primary Phone Count (Added)

assignments.description: Resets var_PrimaryCount to 0 before the phone primary-validation loop. Routes to Loop_Count_Primary_Phones.
assignments.name: Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Phone
assignments.label: Reset Primary Count for Phone

decisions.description: Checks whether var_DeletePhones contains any records. If yes, routes to Screen_Confirm_Delete_Phone. If no, routes to Decision_Has_New_Phones.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Delete_Phones
decisions.label: Any Phones to Delete?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_NewPhones contains any records. If not empty, routes to Create_New_Phones. If empty, skips to Decision_Has_Update_Phones.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_New_Phones
decisions.label: Any New Phones to Create?

decisions.description: Checks whether var_UpdatePhones contains any records. If not empty, routes to Update_Phones. If empty, routes to Screen_Success_Phone.
decisions.name: Decision_Has_Update_Phones
decisions.label: Any Phones to Update?

decisions.description: After deleting phones, routes to the field-clear loop only for Person Accounts. Business accounts don't have typed phone fields to clear.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Person_Account_Delete
decisions.label: Is Person Account? (Post-Delete)

decisions.description: Checks whether Loop_Count_Primary_Phones.field_Phone_IsPrimary is true. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount. If false, loops to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Phone_Primary
decisions.label: Is Phone Primary?

decisions.description: Checks field_Phone_IsPrimary on current Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added item. If true, increments var_PrimaryCount. If false, continues to next item.
decisions.name: Decision_Is_Phone_Primary_Added
decisions.label: Is Added Phone Primary?

decisions.description: Checks Loop_Split_Phones.field_Phone_MarkedForDeletion. If true, routes to Assign_Build_Delete_Phone. If false, routes to Assign_Build_Update_Phone.
decisions.name: Decision_Phone_Marked_Delete
decisions.label: Phone Marked for Deletion?

decisions.description: Evaluates var_PrimaryCount after Loop_Count_Primary_Phones and Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added. If greater than 1, routes to Screen_Error_Primary. If zero or one, proceeds to Loop_Split_Phones.
decisions.name: Decision_Phone_Primary_Valid
decisions.label: Phone Primary Count Valid?

decisions.description: Routes to the correct Account phone field clear based on the deleted CPP's Map_To__c value.
decisions.name: Decision_Which_Phone_Field_To_Clear
decisions.label: Which Account Phone Field?

Flow.description: Screen subflow called by SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints to manage ContactPointPhone records for a given Account. Receives pre-queried phone records via var_AllPhones, the Account record via var_Account, and phone-sync ACR collections via var_SyncPhoneACRs and var_NoSyncPhoneACRs. Handles add, edit, and delete (with deletion confirmation) with primary validation (max one primary). All DML faults route to Error_Screen.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Retrieves Invalid_Reason__c picklist values from ContactPointPhone for the Invalid Reason dropdown in Screen_Manage_Phones.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: dcs_InvalidReason_Phone

dynamicChoiceSets.description: Retrieves Map_To__c picklist values from ContactPointPhone for the Map To dropdown in Screen_Manage_Phones.
dynamicChoiceSets.name: dcs_MapTo_Phone

Flow.label: SMQS Screen Manage ContactPoints Phone Subflow

loops.description: Iterates var_DeletePhones after deletion. For each deleted CPP, Decision_Which_Phone_Field routes to the appropriate Account field clear based on Map_To__c. Only runs for Person Accounts.
loops.name: Loop_Clear_Account_Phone_Fields
loops.label: Loop Over Deleted Phones

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList.PrepopulatedItems to count how many have IsPrimary = true. Each item routes through Decision_Is_Phone_Primary. After all items, routes to Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Phones
loops.label: Count Primary Phones (Existing)

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList.AddedItems to count how many newly added phone rows have the Primary checkbox checked, continuing the tally from Loop_Count_Primary_Phones. After all added rows, Decision_Phone_Primary_Valid evaluates the total count.
loops.name: Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added
loops.label: Count Primary Phones (Added)

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList.PrepopulatedItems. Routes each item through Decision_Phone_Marked_Delete: if Marked_For_Deletion__c is true, adds to var_DeletePhones; otherwise builds update record.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Phones
loops.label: Build Update Phones from Existing

loops.description: Iterates PhonesList.AddedItems after primary validation passes. For each added row, Assign_Build_New_Phone stamps screen field values and ParentId onto var_SinglePhone, then adds var_SinglePhone to var_NewPhones. Routes to Decision_Has_Delete_Phones when done.
loops.name: Loop_Split_Phones_New
loops.label: Build New Phones from Added

recordCreates.description: Performs a single DML insert for all records in var_NewPhones. On success, routes to Decision_Has_Update_Phones. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordCreates.name: Create_New_Phones
recordCreates.label: Create New Phone Records

recordDeletes.description: Permanently deletes all records in var_DeletePhones. On success, routes to Decision_Is_Person_Account_Delete. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordDeletes.name: Delete_Phones
recordDeletes.label: Delete Phones

recordUpdates.description: Clears PersonHomePhone on the Account when a deleted CPP had Map_To__c = Home Phone. Routes back to loop.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_PersonHomePhone
recordUpdates.label: Clear PersonHomePhone

recordUpdates.description: Clears PersonMobilePhone on the Account when a deleted CPP had Map_To__c = Mobile. Routes back to loop.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_PersonMobilePhone
recordUpdates.label: Clear PersonMobilePhone

recordUpdates.description: Clears PersonOtherPhone on the Account when a deleted CPP had Map_To__c = Other Phone. Routes back to loop.
recordUpdates.name: Clear_PersonOtherPhone
recordUpdates.label: Clear PersonOtherPhone

recordUpdates.description: Performs a single DML update for all records in var_UpdatePhones. On success, routes to Screen_Success_Phone. On fault, routes to Error_Screen.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Phones
recordUpdates.label: Update Phone Records

screens.description: Shared fault screen displayed when any DML operation fails. Surfaces the triggering record Id and name, the full fault message, and the current flow stage so an administrator can diagnose the failure.
screens.name: Error_Screen
screens.label: Error Screen

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
The screen flow "Manage Contact Points" has failed. Please send this message to your administrator.


Triggering record: {!recordId} - {!var_Account.Name}


Fault Message: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}


Current Stage: {!$Flow.CurrentStage}

screens.description: Confirmation screen shown when var_DeletePhones is not empty. Displays phones to be permanently deleted and phones to be kept. User clicks Confirm Delete to proceed or Go Back to uncheck.
screens.name: Screen_Confirm_Delete_Phone
screens.label: Confirm Phone Deletion

fields.name: txt_Confirm_Delete_Phone_Warning
fields.fieldText: The following phone numbers will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Click "Go Back and Review" to uncheck any that should be kept.

fields.name: txt_Delete_Phone_Header
fields.fieldText:
Phone numbers to be deleted


Note: Based on the Map To field, a phone field on the account record (Home Phone, Mobile, Other Phone) will be cleared when records are deleted.﻿

fields.name: txt_Keep_Phone_Header
fields.fieldText: Phone numbers that will be kept

screens.description: Displayed when the user marks more than one record as Primary in the repeater. allowBack is true so the user can return and correct. allowFinish is false so the flow cannot complete in this error state.
screens.name: Screen_Error_Primary
screens.label: Primary Validation Error

fields.name: txt_Error_Primary
fields.fieldText:
Only one record can be marked as Primary.


Please go back and update your selections so that no more than one record has Primary checked.

screens.description: Displays all ContactPointPhone records for this Account in a repeater pre-populated from var_AllPhones (sorted primary first). Two read-only datatables above the repeater show which household members will (var_SyncPhoneACRs) and will not (var_NoSyncPhoneACRs) receive phone syncs. Users can edit or add rows. On Save, primary validation runs before DML.
screens.name: Screen_Manage_Phones
screens.label: Manage Phone Numbers

fields.name: txt_SyncPhoneYes_Header_Person
fields.fieldText: A home phone will be shared with these household members:

fields.name: txt_SyncPhoneYes_Header_Household
fields.fieldText: The household's phone will be shared with these household members as their home phone:

value.stringValue: Phone sync is on for these contacts

fields.name: txt_SyncPhone_NoSync_Notice_Generic
fields.fieldText: These household members won't be affected by any changes.

value.stringValue: Phone sync is off for these contacts

fields.name: txt_SyncPhone_NoSync_Notice
fields.fieldText: Replacing the primary phone will not affect the household — phone sync is off for this member.

fields.name: txt_Phone_Marked_Delete_Above
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This phone number is marked for deletion.

fields.name: field_ExtensionNumber
fields.fieldText: Extension

fields.name: field_Phone_MapTo
fields.fieldText: Map To

fields.name: field_Phone_IsActive
fields.fieldText: Active

fields.name: field_Phone_IsPrimary
fields.fieldText: Primary

fields.name: field_Phone_InvalidReason
fields.fieldText: Invalid Reason

fields.name: field_Phone_MarkedForDeletion
fields.fieldText: Mark for Deletion

fields.name: txt_Phone_Marked_Delete_Below
fields.fieldText: ⚠ This phone number is marked for deletion.

screens.description: Confirmation screen displayed after phone DML completes successfully. Shows the Account name and tables of created and updated phone number records.
screens.name: Screen_Success_Phone
screens.label: Phone Numbers Updated

fields.name: txt_Success_Phone_None
fields.fieldText: ﻿No records have been updated or created.

fields.name: txt_Success_Phone
fields.fieldText: These phone numbers for {!var_Account.Name} have been created.

fields.name: txt_Success_Phone_Update
fields.fieldText: These phone numbers for {!var_Account.Name} have been updated.

variables.description: Account Id passed in from the parent flow. Used to stamp ParentId on new ContactPointPhone records.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: Account record passed in from the parent flow. Used in error screen display ({!var_Account.Name}).
variables.name: var_Account

variables.description: All ContactPointPhone records for this Account, pre-queried by the parent flow via SMQS_Screen_Manage_ContactPoints_Subflow. Passed in sorted IsPrimary DESC. Used to pre-populate the PhonesList repeater.
variables.name: var_AllPhones

variables.description: Accumulates delete-ready ContactPointPhone records (Id-only) built from PhonesList.PrepopulatedItems marked for deletion during Loop_Split_Phones. Passed to Delete_Phones for a single bulk delete.
variables.name: var_DeletePhones

variables.description: Set to true by Assign_Build_Delete_Phone when at least one phone is marked for deletion. Used by visibility rules on the delete table and its header on Screen_Confirm_Delete_Phone.
variables.name: var_HasDeletePhones

variables.description: Set to true by Assign_Flag_New_Phones when var_NewPhones is not empty. Used by Screen_Success_Phone to conditionally show the Created datatable.
variables.name: var_HasNewPhones

variables.description: Set to true by Assign_Flag_Update_Phones when var_UpdatePhones is not empty. Used by Screen_Success_Phone to conditionally show the Updated datatable.
variables.name: var_HasUpdatePhones

variables.description: The household account name, passed in from the parent. Used in the Household Phone Sync section header.
variables.name: var_HouseholdName

variables.description: Accumulates new ContactPointPhone records built from PhonesList.AddedItems during Loop_Split_Phones_New. Passed to Create_New_Phones for a single bulk insert.
variables.name: var_NewPhones

variables.description: Active AccountContactRelation records where Sync_Household_Phone__c = false. Pre-queried by parent. Displayed in dt_SyncPhoneNo on Screen_Manage_Phones.
variables.name: var_NoSyncPhoneACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Phone__c = false. Passed in from parent. Used by visibility rules on phone sync section headers and dt_SyncPhoneNo.
variables.name: var_NoSyncPhoneACRs_Count

variables.description: The Person Account's own ACR connecting them to their household. Null for Household/Business accounts. Sync_Household_Phone__c drives visibility of the individual no-sync notice.
variables.name: var_PersonACR

variables.description: Counter used by Loop_Count_Primary_Phones and Loop_Count_Primary_Phones_Added to tally how many rows have IsPrimary = true. Reset to 0 by Assign_Reset_Primary_Count_Phone before counting. Evaluated by Decision_Phone_Primary_Valid.
variables.name: var_PrimaryCount

variables.description: Scratch variable used as a staging record during the build loops. Reused for new and update scenarios.
variables.name: var_SinglePhone

variables.description: Active AccountContactRelation records where Sync_Household_Phone__c = true. Pre-queried by parent. Displayed in dt_SyncPhoneYes on Screen_Manage_Phones.
variables.name: var_SyncPhoneACRs

variables.description: Count of active ACRs where Sync_Household_Phone__c = true. Passed in from parent. Used by visibility rules on phone sync section headers and dt_SyncPhoneYes.
variables.name: var_SyncPhoneACRs_Count

variables.description: Accumulates update-ready ContactPointPhone records built from PhonesList.PrepopulatedItems (not marked for deletion) during Loop_Split_Phones. Passed to Update_Phones for a single bulk update.
variables.name: var_UpdatePhones
